hero.title: Monetizing Foreign VAT Reclaim for Business Customers
hero.description: Foreign business expenses (travel, trade shows, services) of your business customers are increasing, but many recoverable foreign VAT amounts are not claimed due to complexity, varying country regulations, documentation requirements, compliance concerns, and manual processing.
hero.solutionText: Our Solution: Elevating customer value and generating passive revenue through a fully automated, compliance-assured platform for B2B VAT recovery, requiring zero effort from your business customer.

steps.title: Data Acquisition
steps.description: Automated transaction data transfer via the VATGenius API.

steps.title: Processing
steps.description: The VATGenius Engine automatically checks documents, compiles them, calculates VAT refund amounts, and reports to business customers.

steps.title: Filing
steps.description: The VATGenius TAX API files the complex application to the relevant foreign tax authority.

steps.title: Pay-Out
steps.description: Funds are received and disbursed seamlessly, directly impacting your business customers results.

items.title: No Effort
items.description: Fully automated identification of refundable VAT.

items.title: Maximum Amount
items.description: AI-supported verification ensures the full potential of VAT refunds.

items.title: Complete Transparency
items.description: Access the status of the application at any time via the banking dashboard.

compliance.title: Compliance & Security: Trust Built on Regulatory Excellence
compliance.description: As a partner in the financial sector, we understand that trust, security, and uncompromising regulatory adherence are non-negotiable. Our solution is engineered to mitigate risk, ensuring full compliance for both your institution and your business customers.

items.label: Dedicated Expertise:
items.text: International tax specialists managing all relevant regulations

items.label: Risk Transfer:
items.text: Offload the entire regulatory burden to us

items.label: Zero-Trust Architecture:
items.text: AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.2+ in transit

items.label: Data Minimization:
items.text: Only necessary data processed per GDPR

secureApi.title: Secure API and Infrastructure
secureApi.description: Our integration is designed to integrate seamlessly without compromising your existing security posture.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: See how VATGenius can help your business customers recover foreign VAT.
cta.buttonText: Request a Live Demo & Partnership Consultation
